commands.build: NODE_ENV=production xcodebuild -workspace streamdownrnexpo56fixture.xcworkspace -scheme streamdownrnexpo56fixture -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -destination id=09BA095C-1865-4E81-8FF1-9097D69AA032 -derivedDataPath /tmp/streamdown-optional-ios-derived CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=YES ARCHS=arm64 EXCLUDED_ARCHS=x86_64 build

runtimeAssertions: Shiki JavaScript regex engine completed tokenization and colored TypeScript tokens were visible
RaTeX native view mounted and rendered x squared
beautiful-mermaid generated normalized SVG and react-native-svg mounted the A to B arrow diagram
react-native-webview fired onLoadEnd and visibly rendered the offline full-fidelity adapter content
Maestro asserted All optional providers ready and Provider beautiful: ready
limitations: Simulator correctness evidence is not physical-device startup, heap-growth, long-block, or frame-budget proof.
The WebView probe verifies native mount and offline load; the separately tested WebView controller owns CSP, navigation, message, timeout, and teardown enforcement.
